name: Uplink KOP
address: 989 Old Eagle School Rd #815, Wayne, PA 19087
about: Uplink KOP is a large entertainment center featuring golf, racing, and esports simulators. The venue offers a wide range of activities including open gaming, memberships, tournaments, leagues, and private events. Golfers can book simulator time, join leagues, or take lessons. The facility caters to various demographics with youth programs, adult events, and corporate team building. Pricing is structured at $10/hour for open gaming sessions, with specific rates available for memberships and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible booking options for individuals and groups
Option to join seasonal golf leagues for competitive play
Availability of professional golf lessons for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, but external food allowed for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator brand featured on the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Golf clubs are provided with the simulator rental. Players can also bring their own equipment if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: External food is allowed for private events and parties. No alcohol service is mentioned on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulation typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Uplink KOP offers youth programs, birthday parties, and after-school clubs specifically designed for children.
